mapper.select: select d.*, p.name as parent_name from departments d left join departments p on p.id = d.parent_id where d.id = #{id}
select d.*, p.name as parent_name from departments d left join departments p on p.id = d.parent_id where d.name = #{name}
mapper.insert: insert into departments (name, parent_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at) values (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{isActive}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update departments set name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update departments set is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
